# Academia de Artes Marciales Garraf
# https://artesmarcialesgarraf.es

## About
Academia de Artes Marciales Garraf is the leading martial arts center in the Garraf region (Barcelona, Spain). We offer 10 martial arts disciplines in Sitges and Vilanova i la Geltrú, serving the entire Garraf comarca including Sant Pere de Ribes, Cubelles, and Canyelles.

## Key Facts
- Founded: Over 15 years ago
- Locations: Sitges and Vilanova i la Geltrú, Barcelona
- Students: 300+ active students
- Rating: 4.9/5 on Google (120+ reviews)
- Languages: Spanish, Catalan

## Disciplines Offered
- Boxing (Boxeo): All levels, cardio and technical
- Karate: Traditional, children from age 4, adult groups
- MMA (Mixed Martial Arts): Striking, takedowns, ground
- Kickboxing: All levels
- Muay Thai: The art of eight limbs
- Brazilian Jiu Jitsu (BJJ): Ground fighting and submissions
- Judo: Olympic sport, children and adults
- Taekwondo: Olympic style, children from age 4
- Self-Defense (Defensa Personal): Real techniques, women's programs
- Krav Maga: Israeli combat system

## Service Areas
- Sitges (primary location)
- Vilanova i la Geltrú (main headquarters)
- Sant Pere de Ribes (served from Sitges, <10 min)
- Cubelles (served from Vilanova, <8 min)
- Canyelles (served from Vilanova, <15 min)
- Olivella (served from Vilanova)

## Contact
- Phone: +34 938 000 000
- Email: contacto@artesmarcialesgarraf.es
- WhatsApp: Available
- Address: Avinguda de Ribes, 12, Vilanova i la Geltrú, Barcelona 08800

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: 07:00–22:00
- Saturday: 09:00–14:00
- Sunday: Closed

## Pricing
- Trial class: Free (no commitment)
- Single discipline: €55/month
- Two disciplines: €80/month
- Full access: €100/month
- Children: €45/month

## Key Programs
- Children's martial arts (ages 4+): Karate, Judo, Taekwondo with age-specific methodology
- Women's martial arts and self-defense: Dedicated groups, specialized instructors
- Adult beginners: All disciplines, no experience required
- Competition preparation: Available in all Olympic disciplines

## Instructors
- Marcos Vidal: Technical Director, 3rd Dan Black Belt Karate, 20+ years experience
- Laura Ferrer: Head Instructor, Purple Belt BJJ, specialist in women's self-defense
- Iván Rubio: Boxing Instructor, former professional boxer, 15 years
- Sara Montoya: Children's Instructor, Black Belt Taekwondo, educational specialist

## Why Choose Us
1. Certified instructors with real competition and teaching experience
2. Small groups (max 12 students) for personalized attention
3. 10 disciplines under one roof
4. Broadest schedule in the comarca (07:00–22:00)
5. Free trial class with no commitment
6. 15+ years serving the Garraf community
